trait.name: Pounce
entries: If the Allosaurus moves 20 ft. in a line, then hits a target equal to its size (or smaller) with its Claw attack, its target is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB} and the Allosaurus can then use its bonus action to make one Bite attack against it.

trait.name: Serrated Jaws
entries: When the Allosaurus hits a creature equal to its size (or smaller) with its Bite attack, it can Grapple the target in its jaws (escape {@dc 14}). While {@variantrule Grappling|XPHB} a creature, it cannot use its Bite attack on other targets.
Each time a creature attempts to escape this Grapple, it takes {@damage 1d8} slashing damage, even on a successful escape.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d10 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Exposed
entries: While the Ankylosaurus is {@condition Prone|XPHB}, it loses both its {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Damage Resistances} and its Thick Hide Trait.

trait.name: Lumbering
entries: Ankylosaurus has disadvantage on Dexterity ability checks and saving throws, and it cannot {@action Dash|XPHB}.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: Ankylosaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution mod. (5).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Ankylosaurus makes two Tail Club attacks.

action.name: Tail Club
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 3d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage, and it must make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 16}). On a failure, its speed is halved until the end of its next turn, and if it is equal to the Ankylosaurus' size or smaller, it falls {@condition Prone|XPHB}.
If it fails by 5 or more, it is also {@condition Stunned|XPHB} for the duration.

trait.name: Lofty Sight
entries: The Apatosaurus has advantage on Wisdom ability checks that rely on its sight while it stands upright.

trait.name: Lumbering
entries: Apatosaurus has disadvantage on Dexterity ability checks and saving throws, and it cannot {@action Dash|XPHB}.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: Apatosaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution mod. (6).

action.name: Titanic Stomp
entries: The Apatosaurus rears up and slams its front legs into the earth, forcing all creatures within 10 ft. to make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 17}). Targets in the Apatosaurus' space have disadvantage. They take {@damage 8d10} bludgeoning damage on a failure, and on a success.
The area affected by this feature, including Apatosaurus' space, becomes {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for all creatures smaller than the Apatosaurus until it is cleared.

action.name: Tail Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 9d8 + 6}) bludgeoning damage, and if it is Huge or smaller, it must make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 17}) or be {@condition Stunned|XPHB} until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Tail Sweep
entries: Apatosaurus forces creatures in an adjacent 15-foot cone to make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 17}). On a failure, they take {@damage 8d10} bludgeoning damage, and if they are Huge or smaller they are knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}. On a success, they take half damage and do not fall {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Swift Wing
entries: While the Archaeopteryx is using its flying speed, {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} against it have disadvantage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}(1) slashing damage.

trait.name: Charge
entries: If the Archelon swims 40 ft. in a line then hits a target smaller than it with its Slam attack, that target is {@condition Stunned|XPHB} until the start of the Archelon's next turn.
If the target of this attack is a boat or seafaring vessel that is smaller than the Archelon, it is capsized on hit.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The Archelon can hold its breath for 1 hour.

trait.name: Strong Jaws
entries: When the Archelon hits a creature at least one size smaller then it with its Bite, it can Grapple the target in its jaws (escape {@dc 14}). While it is {@variantrule Grappling|XPHB} a creature, it cannot use its Bite attack on other targets.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: The Archelon reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution mod. (3).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Archelon makes two attacks, using its Bite and Slam attacks in any combination.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 3d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Lofty Sight
entries: The Brontosaurus has advantage on all Wisdom ability checks that rely on its sight while it stands upright.

trait.name: Lumbering
entries: Brontosaurus has disadvantage on Dexterity ability checks and saving throws, and it cannot {@action Dash|XPHB}.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: The Brontosaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution modifier (5).

action.name: Titanic Stomp
entries: The Brontosaurus rears up and slams its front legs into the earth, forcing all creatures within 5 ft. to make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 16}). Targets in the Brontosaurus' space have disadvantage on this saving throw. Creatures take {@damage 4d10} bludgeoning damage on a failed save, and half as much bludgeoning damage on a success.
The area affected by this feature, including the Brontosaurus' space, becomes {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for all creatures smaller than the Brontosaurus until it is cleared.

action.name: Tail Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 6d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage, and if it is smaller than the Brontosaurus, it must make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 16}) or be {@condition Stunned|XPHB} until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Tail Sweep
entries: The Brontosaurus forces creatures in an adjacent 15-foot cone to make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 16}). On a failure, they take {@damage 4d10} bludgeoning damage, and if they are smaller than the Brontosaurus they are knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}. On a success, they take half damage and do not fall {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Mighty Leap
entries: Once per turn, a Deinonychus can spend 5 ft. of its movement to long jump up to 20 ft., or high jump to 10 ft., even if this exceeds is remaining speed.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The Deinonychus has advantage on attack rolls against {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} targets within 5 feet of a conscious creature that is allied with the Deinonychus.

trait.name: Terrible Claw
entries: If Deinonychus hits a creature at least one size larger than it with its Claw, it can Grapple it. Instead of reducing the target's speed, Deinonychus climbs on it, moves with it, and has advantage on attacks against it.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d10 + 3}) slashing damage.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The Dimetrodon can hold its breath for up to 30 minutes while it is underwater.

trait.name: Natural Camouflage
entries: The Dimetrodon has advantage on all {@skill Stealth|XPHB} checks in swampland, marshes, or underwater.

trait.name: Strong Jaws
entries: If the Dimetrodon hits a creature equal to its size (or smaller) with a Bite, it can Grapple it in its jaws (escape {@dc 13}). When {@variantrule Grappling|XPHB} another creature the Dimetrodon cannot use its Bite attack on other targets.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d10 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage, and it must make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 13}) or fall {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Ambush Strike
entries: If the Elasmosaurus hits a creature with its Bite while the target is unaware of the Elasmosaurus, the attack deals a bonus {@damage 2d8} damage on hit.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The Elasmosaurus can hold its breath for up to 2 hours while it is underwater.

trait.name: Strong Jaws
entries: If the Elasmosaurus hits a creature at least one size smaller then it with its Bite, it can Grapple the target in its jaws (escape {@dc 16}). While it is {@variantrule Grappling|XPHB} a creature, it cannot use its Bite attack on other targets.

trait.name: Underwater Camouflage
entries: Elasmosaurus has advantage on {@skill Stealth|XPHB} checks it makes to {@action Hide|XPHB} while it is underwater.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Elasmosaurus makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 3d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Light Frame
entries: The Gallimimus is considered Medium for determining carrying capacity and targets it can Grapple.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The Gallimimus has advantage on attack rolls against {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} targets within 5 feet of a conscious creature that is allied with the Gallimimus.

trait.name: Skittish
entries: The Gallimimus has advantage on {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} rolls, and Wisdom ability checks that rely on its sight.

trait.name: Sprinter
entries: When the Gallimimus takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} action, its speed bonus is doubled, and {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} against it have disadvantage until the end of that turn.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Kick
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d8 + 2}) slashing damage, and it can't make {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} against the Gallimimus this turn.

trait.name: Herd Defense
entries: For each additional Hadrosaurus within 30 ft., the Hadrosaurus gains a +1 bonus to {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB}, ability checks, and saving throws (maximum +10).

trait.name: Trampling Charge
entries: If the Hadrosaurus moves at least 20 ft. in a line and hits a creature equal to its size (or smaller) with a Slam attack, it falls {@condition Prone|XPHB} and the Hadrosaurus can use a bonus action to make a Stomp attack at it.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d4 + 3}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Herd Defense
entries: For each additional Iguanodon within 30 ft., the Iguanodon gains a +1 bonus to its {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB}, ability checks, and saving throws (maximum +10).

trait.name: Trampling Charge
entries: If the Iguanodon moves at least 20 ft. in a line and hits a creature equal to its size (or smaller) with a Slam attack, it falls {@condition Prone|XPHB} and the Iguanodon can use a bonus action to make a Stomp attack at it.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d4 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Thumb Spike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d8 + 4}) piercing damage, and it must make a Constitution saving throw ({@dc 14}). On a failure, it takes another {@damage 2d8} damage at the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The Mosasaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The Mosasaurus's attacks deal the maximum possible damage, in place of rolling, to objects and boats.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: The Mosasaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution modifier (4).

trait.name: Underwater Camouflage
entries: The Mosasaurus has advantage on {@skill Stealth|XPHB} checks it makes to {@action Hide|XPHB} while it is underwater.

trait.name: Swallow
entries: Any creature that is Swallowed by the Mosasaurus is {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, it has total cover from all outside attacks and effects, and it takes ({@damage 3d6}) acid damage at the start of each of the Mosasaurus' turns.

At the start of each of its turns, the Mosasaurus must make a Constitution saving throw (DC is the total damage it has taken since its previous turn) or Swallowed creatures land {@condition Prone|XPHB} in an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Mosasaurus makes two attacks; one with its Bite and one with its Tail, or two attacks with its Tail. It cannot attack the same target with both a Bite and Tail attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 5d10 + 7}) piercing damage, and if the target is two sizes smaller than the Mosasaurus (or smaller), it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw ({@dc 18}) or be Swallowed.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 4d8 + 7}) bludgeoning damage, and if it is one size smaller than the Mosasaurus (or smaller) it is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB} if it is a creature, or capsized if it is a seafaring vessel.

trait.name: Light Frame
entries: The Ornithomimus is considered Small for determining carrying capacity and targets it can Grapple.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The Ornithomimus has advantage on attack rolls against {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} targets within 5 feet of a conscious creature that is allied with the Ornithomimus.

trait.name: Skittish
entries: The Ornithomimus has advantage on {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} rolls, and Wisdom ability checks that rely on its sight.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Kick
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d6 + 2}) slashing damage, and it can't make {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} against the Ornithomimus this turn.

trait.name: Bone Plate
entries: If Pachycephalosaurus moves at least 20 ft. in a line, then hits an object or structure with its Ram, its attack deals maximum damage, in place of rolling.

trait.name: Concussive Charge
entries: If the Pachycephalosaurus moves at least 20 ft. in a straight line, then hits with a Ram attack, it deals a bonus {@damage 3d8} damage, and the target must make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 14}). On a failure, a creature equal to Pachycephalosaurus' size or smaller falls {@condition Prone|XPHB}.
If a creature fails this saving throw by 5 or more, it is also {@condition Stunned|XPHB} until the beginning of its next turn.

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d8 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage, and a target smaller than Pachycephalosaurus' must make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 14}) or be knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Herd Defense
entries: For each Parasaurolophus within 30 ft., the Parasaurolophus gains a +1 bonus to {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB}, ability checks, and saving throws (maximum +10).

trait.name: Trampling Charge
entries: If the Parasaurolophus moves at least 20 ft. in a line and hits a creature equal to its size or smaller with its Slam, it falls {@condition Prone|XPHB} and Parasaurolophus can use a bonus action to make a Stomp attack at it.

action.name: Crest Horn {@recharge 5}
entries: As an action Parasaurolophus produces blast from its head crest, forcing creatures that can hear it within 30 feet to make a Constitution saving throw ({@dc 16}). On a failure, creatures take {@damage 2d8} thunder damage and are {@condition Deafened|XPHB} until the end of their next turn. Parasaurolophus are immune to this feature.
If they fail by 5 or more, they are also {@condition Frightened|XPHB} of all Parasaurolophus they can see for the same duration.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d4 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Ambush Strike
entries: If the Plesiosaurus hits a creature with its Bite while the target is unaware of the Plesiosaurus, the attack deals a bonus {@damage 2d6} damage on hit.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: Plesiosaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.

trait.name: Underwater Camouflage
entries: The Plesiosaurus has advantage on {@skill Stealth|XPHB} checks made to {@action Hide|XPHB} while it is underwater.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Hunter's Grasp
entries: When the Pteranodon hits a target at least two sizes smaller than it with its Claw attack, it can automatically Grapple the target (escape {@dc 9}).

trait.name: Light Frame
entries: The Pteranodon is a Medium creature for determining its carrying capacity and Grapple checks.

trait.name: Swift Wing
entries: While the Pteranodon uses its flying speed, {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} against it have disadvantage.

trait.name: Swoop
entries: When the Pteranodon flies at least 25 ft. in a line toward a creature, then hits it with a Beak attack, it deals a bonus {@damage 2d6} damage, and it can't target the Pteranodon with {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} until the Pteranodon's next turn.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 3}) slashing damage.

trait.name: Light Frame
entries: The Pterodactyl counts as a Small creature for determining its carrying capacity and Grapple checks.

trait.name: Swift Wing
entries: While the Pterodactyl uses its flying speed, {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} against it have disadvantage.

trait.name: Swoop
entries: When the Pterodactyl flies at least 20 ft. in a line toward a creature, then hits it with a Beak attack, it deals a bonus {@damage 2d6} damage, and it can't target the Pterodactyl with {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} until the Pterodactyl's next turn.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Airborne Evasion
entries: If the Quetzalcoatlus is forced to make a Dexterity saving throw to avoid damage while flying, it takes no damage on a success, and half on a failure.

trait.name: Hunter's Beak
entries: When the Quetzalcoatlus hits a target at least two sizes smaller than it with its Beak attack, it can automatically Grapple the target (escape {@dc 12}).

trait.name: Lofty Sight
entries: While flying, Quetzalcoatlus has advantage on all Wisdom ability checks based on its sense of sight.

trait.name: Swoop
entries: If the Quetzalcoatlus flies at least 30 ft. in a line, then hits a creature with a Beak attack, it deals a bonus {@damage 3d8} damage, and it can't target the Quetzalcoatlus with {@action opportunity attack|XPHB|opportunity attacks} until the Quetzalcoatlus' next turn.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 3d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Great Wings
entries: The Quetzalcoatlus flaps its great wings, forcing creatures in an adjacent 30-foot cone to make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 14}), or be knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Aquatic Camouflage
entries: The Spinosaurus has advantage on {@skill Stealth|XPHB} checks it makes to {@action Hide|XPHB} while it is underwater.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: Spinosaurus can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

trait.name: Imposing Presence
entries: The Spinosaurus uses its Strength, in place of Charisma, for {@skill Intimidation|XPHB} checks (included above).

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: The Spinosaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution modifier (3).

trait.name: Serrated Jaws
entries: When the Spinosaurus hits a creature equal to its size (or smaller) with its Bite, it can Grapple the target in its jaws (escape {@dc 17}). While {@variantrule Grappling|XPHB} a creature in this way, Spinosaurus cannot Bite other targets.
Each time a creature attempts to escape this Grapple, it takes {@damage 2d6} slashing damage, even on a successful escape.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Spinosaurus makes two attacks: one with its Bite and one with its Tail, but not against the same target.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}33 ({@damage 4d12 + 6}) piercing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) bludgeoning damage, and if the target is equal to its size or smaller, it is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Lumbering
entries: Stegosaurus has disadvantage on Dexterity ability checks and saving throws, and it cannot {@action Dash|XPHB}.

trait.name: Raised Tail
entries: The Stegosaurus can use its reaction to make an {@action opportunity attack|XPHB} when a creature enters the reach of its Thagomizer attack (10 ft.).

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: Stegosaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution mod. (3).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Stegosaurus makes two attacks, using its Stomp and Thagomizer in any combination.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one {@condition Prone|XPHB} target. {@h}({@damage 2d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Thagomizer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 3d8 + 5}) piercing damage, and it must make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 15}). On a failure, its speed is halved until the end of its next turn, and if it is equal to the Stegosaurus' size or smaller, it falls {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Bone Shield
entries: At the end of its turn, the Styracosaurus picks which way it will face. Until the end of its next turn, it gains {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Half Cover} against all attacks and effects from that direction.

trait.name: Herd Defense
entries: For each additional Styracosaurus within 30 ft., the Styracosaurus gains a +1 bonus to {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB}, ability checks, and saving throws (maximum +10).

trait.name: Trampling Charge
entries: If the Styracosaurus moves at least 20 feet in a straight line, then hits with a Gore attack, it deals a bonus {@damage 1d8} damage. If its target is equal to the Styracosaurus' size or smaller, the target falls {@condition Prone|XPHB}, and the Styracosaurus can use its bonus action to make a Stomp attack against it.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: Styracosaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution modifier (3).

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d8 + 4}) piercing damage, and if the creature is equal to the Styracosaurus' size or smaller, its speed is halved until the end of the Styracosaurus' next turn.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Lofty Sight
entries: The Titanosaurus has advantage on all Wisdom ability checks that rely on its sight while it stands upright.

trait.name: Lumbering
entries: Titanosaurus has disadvantage on all Dexterity ability checks and saving throws, and it cannot {@action Dash|XPHB}.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: Titanosaurus deals the maximum amount of damage, instead of rolling, to all objects and structures.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: Titanosaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution modifier (7).

trait.name: Titanic Weight
entries: Any space the Titanosaurus moves through becomes {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for all creatures smaller than Huge.

action.name: Titanic Stomp
entries: The Titanosaurus rears up and slams its front legs into the earth, forcing all creatures within 15 ft. to make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 19}). Targets in the Titanosaurus' space have disadvantage on this saving throw. Creatures take {@damage 8d10} bludgeoning damage on a failed save, and half as much bludgeoning damage on a success.
The area affected by this feature, including the Titanosaurus' space, becomes {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for all creatures smaller than the Titanosaurus until it is cleared.

action.name: Tail Slam
entries: The Titanosaurus slams its tail down, forcing everything in an adjacent 10-foot wide, 30-foot long line to make a Dexterity saving throw ({@dc 19}). On a failure, targets take {@damage 9d10} bludgeoning damage, and if Huge or smaller, they fall {@condition Prone|XPHB} and are {@condition Stunned|XPHB} until the end of their next turn. On a success, they take half damage and suffer no other effects.

action.name: Tail Sweep
entries: The Titanosaurus forces creatures in an adjacent 20-foot cone to make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 19}). On a failure, they take {@damage 8d10} bludgeoning damage, and if they are smaller than the Titanosaurus they are knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}. On a success, they take half damage and do not fall {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Bone Shield
entries: At the end of its turn, Triceratops chooses which way it will face. Until the end of its next turn, it has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Half Cover} against attacks and effects in that direction.

trait.name: Herd Defense
entries: For each additional Triceratops within 30 ft., the Triceratops gains a +1 bonus to its {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB}, ability checks, and saving throws (maximum +10).

trait.name: Imposing Presence
entries: The Triceratops uses its Strength, in place of Charisma, for {@skill Intimidation|XPHB} checks (see above).

trait.name: Trampling Charge
entries: If the Triceratops moves at least 20 feet in a line, then hits with its Gore, it deals a bonus {@damage 2d8} damage. If the creature is equal to the Triceratops' size or smaller, the target falls {@condition Prone|XPHB}, and the Triceratops can use its bonus action to make a Stomp attack against it.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: Triceratops reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution mod. (5).

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 4d8 + 7}) piercing damage, and it must make a Constitution saving throw ({@dc 18}) or its AC is reduced by 2 and its speed is halved until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 3d10 + 7}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Imposing Presence
entries: The Tyrannosaurus uses its Strength, in place of Charisma, for {@skill Intimidation|XPHB} checks (included above).

trait.name: Swallow
entries: If the Tyrannosaurus hits a creature it is {@variantrule Grappling|XPHB} that is at least two sized smaller than it with its Bite, it can Swallow it. A swallowed creature is {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and {@condition Blinded|XPHB}, it has total cover from all attacks and other effects outside the Tyrannosaurus, and it takes ({@damage 4d6}) acid damage at the start of each of the Tyrannosaurus' turns.

At the start of each of its turns, the Tyrannosaurus must make a Constitution saving throw (DC is the damage it has taken since the end of its last turn) or the swallowed creature lands {@condition Prone|XPHB} in an unoccupied space within 5 ft.

trait.name: Strong Jaws
entries: When the Tyrannosaurus hits a creature equal to its size (or smaller) with its Bite, it can Grapple the target in its jaws (escape {@dc 19}). While {@variantrule Grappling|XPHB} a creature this way, it cannot use its Bite attack on other targets.

trait.name: Thick Hide
entries: Tyrannosaurus reduces all damage, other than force, psychic, and radiant by its Constitution modifier (4).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Tyrannosaurus makes two attacks: one with its Bite and one with its Tail, but not against the same target.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}33 ({@damage 4d12 + 7}) piercing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d8 + 7}) bludgeoning damage, and if the target is equal to its size or smaller, it is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

action.name: Tyrant's Roar {@recharge 4}
entries: The Tyrannosaurus Rex forces all {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creatures that can hear it within 120 ft. to make a Wisdom saving throw ({@dc 19}), or they are {@condition Frightened|XPHB} of the Tyrannosaurus for 1 minute. They repeat the saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the effect on a success.
Creatures that succeed on this saving throw are immune to the Tyrannosaurus' Tyrant's Roar for the next 24 hours.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The Utahraptor has advantage on attack rolls against {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} targets within 5 feet of a conscious creature that is allied with the Utahraptor.

trait.name: Terrible Claw
entries: If Utahraptor hits a creature at least one size larger than it with its Claw, it can Grapple it. Instead of reducing the target's speed, Utahraptor climbs on it, moves with it, and has advantage on attacks against it.

trait.name: Terror Leap
entries: Once per turn, the Utahraptor can expend 5 ft. of its movement to long jump up to 25 ft., or high jump to 15 ft., even if this exceeds is remaining speed.

If the Utahraptor hits with a Claw immediately after using Terror Leap, it deals a bonus {@damage 2d8} damage, and the target must make a Strength saving throw ({@dc 14}) or fall {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 2d6 + 4}) slashing damage.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The Velociraptor has advantage on attack rolls against {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} targets within 5 feet of a conscious creature that is allied with the Velociraptor.

trait.name: Terrible Claw
entries: If Velociraptor hits a creature at least one size larger than it with its Claw, it can Grapple it. Instead of reducing the target's speed, Velociraptor climbs on it, moves with it, and has advantage on attacks against it.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}({@damage 1d4 + 2}) slashing damage.

variantrule.name: Ancient Beasts
entries: Beasts with the {@b Ancient} subtype (all of those in this document) are to be included only at the discretion of the Dungeon Master. Do not assume you will be able to use Ancient Beasts without DM permission.
{@style Unleash Wild Fury with this Compendium of Alternate {@s Beasts} DINOSAURS for the World's Greatest Roleplaying Game|dnd-font;large}
